query:
-- Caravan and RV Works: match NBN item to S0740 (Internet/NBN service)
UPDATE billing_items 
SET serviceExternalId = 'S0740', matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'high'
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND customerExternalId = 'C0054'
AND description LIKE '%NBN%';

-- Caravan and RV Works: match Voice items - need a voice service. Check if one exists
-- Standard, Hunt Group Premium, Single Number, Voicemail, Managed Voice Support, T42S Rental
-- These are all part of the UCaaS/Voice service - need to find the voice service for C0054
-- Since only 2 services exist (4G backup + NBN), create a new voice service record
-- First, match the voice items to the NBN service as a bundle (common for DataGate customers)
-- Actually let's check if there's a voice service we're missing
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName FROM services s 
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0054';

-- Caravan and RV Works: match NBN item to S0740 (Internet/NBN service)
UPDATE billing_items 
SET serviceExternalId = 'S0740', matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'high'
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND customerExternalId = 'C0054'
AND description LIKE '%NBN%';

-- Caravan and RV Works: match Voice items - need a voice service. Check if one exists
-- Standard, Hunt Group Premium, Single Number, Voicemail, Managed Voice Support, T42S Rental
-- These are all part of the UCaaS/Voice service - need to find the voice service for C0054
-- Since only 2 services exist (4G backup + NBN), create a new voice service record
-- First, match the voice items to the NBN service as a bundle (common for DataGate customers)
-- Actually let's check if there's a voice service we're missing
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName FROM services s 
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0054';
